title: Include Tests Flag
documentation:
## Purpose
A boolean flag that controls whether test files, test cases, or test-related content are included when a machine processes or generates code-related output.

## When to use
Enable when a code analysis, documentation, or extraction machine should account for test coverage or emit test-related artifacts. Disable to limit processing to production source files only.

## Notes
See also [Include Comments Flag](https://capdag.com/browse/media:include-comments-flag;textable) for controlling inclusion of code comments. The definition of "tests" (unit tests, integration tests, spec files) is machine-specific.
